color_logic.source: active permit segment filter when selected, otherwise dominant permit segment from hotspot result

development_hotspot_symbology.size_logic: Marker size is based on the strongest available activity signal across development_activity_score, permit_signal_score_max, total_permit_count, recent permit counts, and activity class.
popup_updates: planning domain derived from selected/dominant segment

flood_constraint_symbology.size_logic: Marker size grows with the stronger of flood_constraint_score or percent_parcel_constrained.
flood_constraint_symbology.default_scope: High-review flood constraint parcels only; low/minimal records are not rendered by default.

legend_updates.development_hotspots: Legend now explains color/shape as permit segment and size as activity intensity.
legend_updates.flood_constraints: Legend now explains color/shape as flood severity and size as constraint score or percent constrained.

validation.backend_validation: not run; backend was not changed

remaining_gaps: Development hotspot domain is shown as a planning-domain label derived from the selected/dominant segment because hotspot rows do not currently expose a separate dominant development_domain field.
No clustering or density rendering was added.
No prediction or probability symbology was added.
